underlying_description: Baltic Exchange Handysize Timecharter Index (public assessment)
unit_of_trading: Any multiple of 1 day of time charter
last_trading_day_rule: Last trading day of the contract month; Dec contract expires on Dec 24 or previous business day if Dec 24 is non-working
final_payment_date_rule: Two Clearing House Business Days following the Last Trading Day
notes: Daily settlement floating price determined by ICE using multiple market sources; final settlement is average of Baltic spot assessments over the determination period

underlying_description: Baltic Dry Index (BDI) as made public by the Baltic Exchange
last_trading_day_rule: Last trading day of the contract month; Dec contract expires on Dec 24 or previous business day if Dec 24 is non-working
final_payment_date_rule: Two Clearing House Business Days following the last day in the determination period
notes: Daily settlement floating price determined by ICE using multiple market sources; final settlement based on average of Baltic BDI index points during determination period
